name: Venu Holding Corp
business: Venu Holding Corporation is an entertainment and hospitality holding company that designs, develops, owns, and operates up-scale music venues, multi-season amphitheaters, and full-service restaurants and bars. It generates revenue through ticket sales, food and beverage sales, venue rentals, naming rights, sponsorships, and parking fees.

exposures.sentence: Venu is an entertainment and hospitality holding company based in Colorado Springs, Colorado that designs, develops, owns, and operates (whether directly or through third-party operators) up-scale music venues, multi-season amphitheaters, and full-service restaurants and bars where music, dining, and luxury experiences converge.
Venu is in varying levels of planning or development to open venues in Oklahoma and Texas, with the Sunset at Broken Arrow expected to open in Fall 2026 and other locations in 2027.

catalysts.event: Opening of The Sunset at Broken Arrow
catalysts.sentence: Venu is in varying levels of planning or development to open venues in Oklahoma and Texas, with the Sunset at Broken Arrow expected to open in Fall 2026 and other locations in 2027.

catalysts.event: The Sunset McKinney expected to be concert-ready
catalysts.sentence: Venu has initiated construction of The Sunset McKinney, with the amphitheater expected to be concert-ready in Q1 2027.

catalysts.event: Opening of The Sunset El Paso
catalysts.sentence: The Sunset El Paso is expected to open in Fall 2027.
Venu intends to open BBP Centennial in the first half of 2027.
